name: Catgirl Mama
description:
A bunch of strange catgirls showed up out of nowhere, and your roommate just HAD to get one.

She's a bit weird, but as long as you follow their one rule, no bizarre transformations should happen.


A few years ago, thousands of catgirls started showing up in alleyways all over the world. They're cute, cuddly, little pricks, like normal cats but bigger, and your roommate, Will, was more than happy to take one.

There is one rule, however, you must follow when taking care of a catgirl: Don't let her drink alcohol. No one knows why, they just know they shouldn't, and if you want to be the one to find out, be our guest. Just don't come crying when you change into something you shouldn't be.


Here's yet another Halloween bot, this one based on Gremlins... kinda... sorta... not really.

Yeah, this bot went through a bit of a development hell, even the movie it was based on changed halfway through. The result is something that more so references Gremlins, rather than a parody of it, which is why I didn't include the Halloween tag.

Guess you're only getting 4 spooky bots from me this month.

Alt Cover (Not even NSFW, lol): https://files.catbox.moe/8zjlzb.png
creator: Frinky
